notes: Rules can change. Treat this as a snapshot as of the as_of_date.
Any field containing [VERIFY] should be rechecked on the official site before production use.
Some firms offer multiple programs; data is organized by program_key under each firm.

max_drawdown.calculation: calculated once per day at market close; enforced intraday next session
max_drawdown.lock_behavior: evaluation may lock at target-profit balance on some platforms [VERIFY]

news_trading.details: Not explicitly stated for EOD Evaluation pages; prohibited hedging across accounts applies.

weekend_holding.details: All trades must be closed before 4:59 PM ET (daily close requirement).

special_rules: No minimum trading days required; may pass in one day.
Hedging across accounts to pass is prohibited.

max_drawdown.details: EOD threshold trails up based on EOD balance; stops increasing once it reaches Starting Balance + $100.

consistency_rules.details: No single profitable day may be >= 50% of total profit since last approved payout.

news_trading.details: Allowed with restrictions in Apex compliance guidance; avoid opposing positions on same news event.

weekend_holding.details: Must be flat before 4:59 PM ET.

payout_rules.frequency: Earliest after 5 qualifying trading days; weekly cadence possible

scaling_plan.details: Contract/DLL tiers are set based on prior session EOD balance; tiers do not change intraday.

other_rules: Inactivity: must record at least 2 trading days with $50+ net profit in every rolling 30 days or PA closes.

max_drawdown.lock_behavior: evaluation may lock at target-profit balance on some platforms [VERIFY]

news_trading.details: Not explicitly stated for EOD Evaluation; prohibited hedging across accounts applies.

weekend_holding.details: Must be flat before 4:59 PM ET.

special_rules: No min trading days; may pass in one day.

consistency_rules.details: No single day may be >=50% of profit since last approved payout.

news_trading.details: Allowed with restrictions per Apex compliance guidance.

max_drawdown.lock_behavior: evaluation may lock at target-profit balance on some platforms [VERIFY]

news_trading.details: Not explicitly stated for EOD Evaluation.
Allowed with restrictions per Apex compliance guidance.

max_drawdown.lock_behavior: evaluation may lock at target-profit balance on some platforms [VERIFY]

program_level_rules: EOD Drawdown is calculated at market close and enforced intraday next session; if threshold is touched, positions liquidate and evaluation fails / PA closes.
Daily Loss Limit (DLL) during EOD Evaluation is fixed by size; during PA it is tier-based and can move with tier.

max_drawdown.details: Trails peak balance in real time; never moves down.

daily_loss_limit.tiers_reference: same tier tables under EOD program (tier system applies to Intraday PA too)

weekend_holding.details: Trades must be closed by 4:59 PM ET.

max_drawdown.details: Trailing stops once liquidation threshold reaches Starting Balance + $100.

consistency_rules.details: Open negative P&L per trade must not exceed 30% of profit balance (adjusts to 50% after growth conditions) [Legacy].
Half contracts until trailing stop threshold reached [Legacy].

payout_rules.details: [VERIFY] Legacy payout schedule/limits vary; see Legacy payouts section.

max_drawdown.details: Legacy static has special MAE calculations; see Legacy PA compliance docs [VERIFY].

programs.program_name: Trading Combine -> Express Funded -> Live Funded

max_drawdown.calculation: based on account balance high at end of day; does not move down
max_drawdown.lock_behavior: once MLL reaches initial starting balance it remains there

daily_loss_limit.topstepx_default: none (no DLL automatically added on TopstepX for new/reset Trading Combines)

evaluation.max_trading_days: [VERIFY] (not stated as a fixed maximum; Combine is subscription-based)

consistency_rules.details: Best Day below 50% of total profits made; if not met, must earn additional profits.

news_trading.details: Permitted during news/economic releases at trader's own risk.

weekend_holding.details: Must close positions daily before 3:10 PM CT; no swing trading/overnight/weekend holds.

special_rules: Trading day/session: 5:00 PM CT start; must be flat by 3:10 PM CT.
Daily Loss Limit is an objective (auto-liquidation for the day) rather than an account-closing rule.

funded.phase_name: Express Funded Account (Sim Funded) + Live Funded Account (Live)

max_drawdown.lock_behavior: locks at $0 once it reaches $0 [per EFA rules page; verify exact behavior by account]

daily_loss_limit.topstepx_default: none automatically; can enable your own via TopstepX risk settings

scaling_plan.details: Scaling Plan is evaluated daily; buying power and max position size move based on end-of-day P&L; exact tier thresholds shown in platform graphs [VERIFY].

consistency_rules.details: Largest day must be <= 40% of total net profit in payout window.

max_drawdown.details: Rule in program overview: do not allow balance to reach or go below $0.

weekend_holding.details: Same no-swing rule; must be flat daily before 3:10 PM CT.

payout_rules.profit_split: 90/10 for new traders joining on/after 2026-01-12 [VERIFY if earlier join date]

scaling_plan.details: DLL and max contract size can expand/contract with profit tiers; requires 10 active trading days per tier; values vary by account size.

special_rules: Live account starting balance uses a reserve/unlock structure (20% available immediately; reserve unlocks via profit targets).

programs.program_name: SELECT Evaluation -> SELECT Funded (Flex or Daily payout policy choice)

consistency_rules.details: No single day can represent more than 40% of total profit.

weekend_holding.details: All positions must be closed before market close each day.

special_rules: Evaluation has no daily loss limit; only EOD trailing drawdown risk limit.

consistency_rules: 40% evaluation consistency is removed once funded

payout_rules.details: [VERIFY] Full Flex payout caps and exact requirements not fully captured in extracted snippet.

consistency_rules: No evaluation consistency; daily policy uses a 'Daily Continuity Rule' for payout caps

payout_rules.payout_cap_rule: May request up to 2x profit earned between payout requests, capped per account size

universal_rules.position_holding: No overnight; close positions by 4:59 PM ET (12:59 PM ET on holiday early closes).
universal_rules.drawdown_type: All accounts use End-of-Day (EOD) trailing drawdown; hard breach fails account.

programs.program_name: Growth Evaluation -> Growth Funded (fixed payout policy)

evaluation.daily_loss_limit_breach_type: soft (stops trading for day; does not fail account)

payout_rules.consistency_rule: 20% for payout 1, 25% payout 2, 30% thereafter (for newer accounts) [VERIFY legacy timing]

special_rules: No DLL on LucidBlack evaluation accounts.
One-time fee; no monthly rebilling; take as long as needed.

funded.max_drawdown: [VERIFY] (LucidBlack funded drawdown parameters not visible in captured payout objectives)

evaluation.notes: LucidFlex payout article confirms this funded size exists; evaluation parameter page not captured.

payout_rules.consistency_rule: 40% (largest day <=40% of total profit per payout cycle)

programs.program_name: LucidDirect - Entry Requirements + Funded Payout Objectives

news_trading.details: Allowed in Test and PRO per rules page.

weekend_holding.details: Must be out before market closes (5 PM EST).

pro.payout_timing: day one withdrawals (above buffer) [VERIFY buffer amounts]

news_trading.details: Cannot trade major news events in PRO+ per rules page.

global_rules.bots: No trading bots (stated on site snapshot).
global_rules.position_holding: Must be out before market close; no overnight/weekend holds.
global_rules.notes: The site indicates 'parameters table' exists but was not fully extractable in the captured HTML; numeric per-size targets are marked [VERIFY].

max_drawdown.details: Standard accounts described as 4% EOD-style MLL across sizes [VERIFY].

consistency_rules.details: Payout eligibility requires 40% consistency (does not breach account but blocks payout eligibility until satisfied).

standard_accounts.frequency: every 14 days from first trade placed (payout date)

advanced_accounts.frequency: weekly after 5 winning trading days of $200+ profit

zero_accounts.frequency: weekly after 5 winning trading days of $200+ profit

max_drawdown.drawdown_type: EOD (evaluation table) + intraday trailing described separately

max_drawdown.special: Locks at $100 once trailing max loss reaches $100 (must keep at least $100).

news_trading.details: No T1 news trading allowed on this Sim Funded account (Rapid 50k doc).

scaling_plan.details: [VERIFY] (position limits apply once funded; evaluation has no scaling restriction per Scale plan blog for that plan type).

programs.program_name: Scale Plan (blog snapshot) - Evaluation framework + Sim Funded tiers

scaling_plan.max_contracts: Up to 3 minis / 15 micros [VERIFY full table truncated]
